source_meta.source_document: Inventory Control Form - LCP Dynamic Helical Hip System (DHHS)

systems.system_notes: Sliding hip screw / dynamic helical hip system family anchored to the official LCP Dynamic Helical Hip System inventory control form.

trays.tray_notes: Official DHHS inventory control materials support a dedicated instrumentation and implant configuration workflow for dynamic hip screw fixation.

components.component_notes: The official inventory control form lists LCP DHHS plate options by hole count and angle.
The official form explicitly lists the LCP DHHS compression screw as part of the implant construct.
The official form explicitly lists the sterile LCP DHHS enhanced compression screw within the construct.
The official form lists 3.5 mm and 5.0 mm locking screw options used with the DHHS construct.
The official form lists 4.5 mm cortex screw options used with the DHHS construct.

products.product_name: LCP DHHS Enhanced Compression Screw, sterile
products.product_notes: Catalog code explicitly listed on the official DHHS inventory control form.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The official form lists multiple plate and screw code matrices, but this pass only captures the named enhanced compression screw product row.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper product-code pass is still needed to expand the full DHHS plate and screw catalogue matrix.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction adds the first reliable coded product without expanding every size and plate variation yet.
